errors.message: The program may crash because division by zero is detected.
Loop may run continuously without a stopping condition.
errors.solution: Add a valid condition or break statement.

errors.message: Pointer is declared but not initialized.
errors.solution: Initialize pointer with nullptr or allocate memory.

errors.message: Array index exceeds declared array size.
errors.solution: Use index within valid array range.
